title: neomammillaria fragilis
intro: Neomammillaria fragilis, also known as the fragile cactus or brittle cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Neomammillaria, characterized by its thin, fragile stems and small flowers. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Neomammillaria fragilis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Neomammillaria fragilis typically involve the use of its stems, which can be dried and ground into a powder for use in topical applications or teas.
